languages.original_text: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

languages.text: {n}Он вонзает мехадендрит в аугментированную руку одного из стоящих рядом техноматов. Энергия змеится по хромовой клешне в батарею, вокс техномата надрывно хрипит, после чего его имплант повисает плетью. Убедившись, что вы увидели эффект, Эоганн перекачивает энергию обратно в аугмент и тот вновь оживает.{/n} "Вопросы?"

{n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

Энергия змеится по хромовой клешне в батарею, вокс техномата надрывно хрипит, после чего его имплант повисает плетью. Убедившись, что вы увидели эффект, Эоганн перекачивает энергию обратно в аугмент и тот вновь оживает.{/n} "Вопросы?"

languages.text: {n}彼は近くのテクノマットの強化された腕にメカデンドライトを刺す。マニピュラスのクロームの爪から電気が彼の細胞に流れ込み、テクノマットのボイスが詰まり、かすれた後、彼のインプラントは動かなくなった。効果を見たことを確認すると、エオガンは電気を強化された腕に戻し、再び動き出した。{/n} 「質問は？」
languages.original_text: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

languages.text: {n}Er bohrt einen Mechadendriten in den augmentierten Arm eines nahe stehenden Technomaten. Energie schlängelt sich von der Chromklaue des Manipulus' in seine Zelle. Das Vox des Technomaten knistert, ehe sein Implantat erschlafft. Als er sicher ist, dass du den Effekt gesehen hast, leitet Eogunn die Energie in die Augmentation zurück, die daraufhin wieder zum Leben erwacht.{/n} "Fragen?"
languages.original_text: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Er bohrt einen Mechadendriten in den augmentierten Arm eines nahe stehenden Technomaten. Energie schlängelt sich von der Chromklaue des Manipulus' in seine Zelle. Das Vox des Technomaten knistert, ehe sein Implantat erschlafft. Als er sicher ist, dass du den Effekt gesehen hast, leitet Eo-gann die Energie in die Augmentation zurück, die daraufhin wieder zum Leben erwacht.{/n} "Fragen?"

languages.text: {n}El sacerdote clava una mecadendrita en el brazo aumentado de un tecnómata cercano. Una corriente eléctrica sube por la garra cromada del manipulus hasta llegar a su célula; el voco del tecnómata emite chasquidos entrecortados, y luego su implante se queda inerte. Tras constatar que has presenciado el suceso, Eogunn devuelve la corriente y el brazo mecánico cobra vida de nuevo.{/n} «¿Alguna pregunta?».
languages.original_text: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

Una corriente eléctrica sube por la garra cromada del manipulus hasta llegar a su célula; el voco del tecnómata emite chasquidos entrecortados, y luego su implante se queda inerte. Tras constatar que has presenciado el suceso, Eo-gann devuelve la corriente y el brazo mecánico cobra vida de nuevo.{/n} «¿Alguna pregunta?».

languages.text: {n}Mekadentritini yakındaki bir teknomatın ogmentli koluna saplıyor. Güç, Manipulus'un krom pençesinden hücresine akıyor. Teknomatın voksu kekeleyip hırıldıyor, ardından implantı cansızlaşıyor. Etkiyi gördüğünüzden emin olduktan sonra Eogunn, gücü tekrar ogmente gönderiyor ve implant hayata dönüyor.{/n} "Sorusu olan?"
languages.original_text: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Mekadentritini yakındaki bir teknomatın ogmentli koluna saplıyor. Güç, Manipulus'un krom pençesinden hücresine akıyor. Teknomatın voksu kekeleyip hırıldıyor, ardından implantı cansızlaşıyor. Etkiyi gördüğünüzden emin olduktan sonra Eo-gann, gücü tekrar ogmente gönderiyor ve implant hayata dönüyor.{/n} "Sorusu olan?"

languages.text: {n}Il fiche une mécadendrite dans le bras augmenté d'un technomate à proximité. Immédiatement, de l'énergie se met à remonter le long de la griffe chromée du manipulus jusqu'à sa cellule. Le vox du technomate bégaie et grince pendant un court instant, puis son implant retombe, comme inanimé. Une fois certain que vous avez bien vu l'effet de sa manipulation, Eogunn renvoie l'énergie en sens inverse et redonne vie au technomate.{/n} « Des questions ? »
languages.original_text: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

Immédiatement, de l'énergie se met à remonter le long de la griffe chromée du manipulus jusqu'à sa cellule. Le vox du technomate bégaie et grince pendant un court instant, puis son implant retombe, comme inanimé. Une fois certain que vous avez bien vu l'effet de sa manipulation, Eo-gann renvoie l'énergie en sens inverse et redonne vie au technomate.{/n} « Des questions ? »

languages.text: {n}他将一根机械触须刺入身旁一名技工的植入物手臂中：能量如蛇般沿着操纵者的铬金利爪涌入他的电池；技工的音阵结结巴巴地发出嘶响，随后他的植入物瘫软下来。在确认你已看清效果后，伊奥贡将能量送回植入物，使其恢复运作。{/n}“可有疑问？”
languages.original_text: {n}He stabs a mechadendrite into the augmented arm of a nearby technomat: power snakes along the Manipulus's chrome claw into his cell; the technomat's vox stutters and rasps, and then his implant goes limp. Once certain that you have seen the effect, Eogunn sends the power back into the augment and it returns to life.{/n} "Questions?"

traits.locale_text: {n}他将一根机械触须刺入身旁一名技工的植入物手臂中：能量如蛇般沿着操纵者的铬金利爪涌入他的电池；技工的音阵结结巴巴地发出嘶响，随后他的植入物瘫软下来。在确认你已看清效果后，埃欧-甘将能量送回植入物，使其恢复运作。{/n}“可有疑问？”
